ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breweries" (
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewery */,
  "brewery_name" TEXT /* Name of the brewery */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the brewery */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the brewery is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the brewery is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the brewery */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the brewery */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brewery */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the brewery's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the brewery's location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the brewery */,
  "facebook_url" TEXT /* Facebook URL of the brewery */,
  "instagram_url" TEXT /* Instagram URL of the brewery */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* Twitter URL of the brewery */,
  "hours_of_operation" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the brewery */,
  "tour_availability" INTEGER /* Whether tours are available at the brewery */,
  "food_availability" INTEGER /* Whether food is available at the brewery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "rsvp_required" INTEGER /* Whether RSVP is required for the event */,
  "rsvp_limit" INTEGER /* Limit on the number of RSVPs for the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, beer release, festival) */,
  "event_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for the event */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of tickets for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, brewery owner, visitor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_rsvps" (
  "rsvp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RSVP */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being RSVP'd to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the RSVP */,
  "rsvp_date" TEXT /* Date the RSVP was made */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests attending the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rsvp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_rsvps_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_rsvps_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brewery_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., logo, interior, exterior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brewery_images_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brewery_beers" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery producing the beer */,
  "beer_name" TEXT /* Name of the beer */,
  "beer_type" TEXT /* Type of beer (e.g., IPA, Pilsner) */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume (ABV) of the beer */,
  "ibu" INTEGER /* International Bitterness Units (IBU) of the beer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beer */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the beer's image */,
  "year_released" INTEGER /* Year the beer was released */,
  "limited_release" INTEGER /* Whether the beer is a limited release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brewery_beers_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_reviews" (
  "beer_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer review */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beer_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beer_reviews_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES brewery_beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beer_ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beer the ingredient is used in */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "ingredient_type" TEXT /* Type of ingredient (e.g., hop, grain, yeast) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beer_ingredients_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES brewery_beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brewery_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brewery that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brewery_awards_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)
